review_text: Decent food but nothing special. Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus  Spezi  Rotkohl  and Gemüseschnitzel were okay. Rotkohl lacked the punch I expected.
Solid experience. Schweinshaxe  Gemüseschnitzel  Rotkohl  and Bratkartoffeln were well-prepared. Rotkohl had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.

Absolutely horrible! Leberknödelsuppe  Hefeweizen (0.5L)  Rinderroulade  Semmelknödel  and Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus arrived ice cold after 2 hour delay. Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus was spoiled. Disgusting!
Not bad  not great. Sauerbraten  Dampfnudel mit Vanillesoße  and Bratkartoffeln were edible. Dampfnudel mit Vanillesoße needed more seasoning.

Enjoyed the Sauerkraut  Spätzle Butter  Schwarzwälder Kirschtorte  Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus  and Dampfnudel mit Vanillesoße! Schwarzwälder Kirschtorte was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Disappointed with Spätzle Butter  Kartoffelsuppe  Bratwurst mit Sauerkraut  Flammkuchen  and Rinderroulade. Spätzle Butter was cold when it arrived. Not worth the money.
Solid experience. Gemüseschnitzel and Flammkuchen were well-prepared. Gemüseschnitzel had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Exceptional quality! Ordered Sauerbraten  Schwarzwälder Kirschtorte  Schweinshaxe  and Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus and everything was delicious. The Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Terrible experience! Bratkartoffeln  Schwarzwälder Kirschtorte  Kartoffelsuppe  and Gemüseschnitzel were all inedible. Gemüseschnitzel was completely burnt. Waste of money!
Incredible meal! Rote Grütze mit Sahne  Leberknödelsuppe  and Laugenbrezel mit Obatzda & Salat arrived hot and fresh. The Laugenbrezel mit Obatzda & Salat was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Appalling quality! Apfelschorle  Rotkohl  and Kartoffelsuppe were swimming in oil. Kartoffelsuppe was raw inside. Health hazard!
Solid experience. Gemüseschnitzel were well-prepared. Gemüseschnitzel had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Hands down the best Rinderroulade I've ever had! Sauerkraut  Flammkuchen  and Rinderroulade were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Enjoyed the Hefeweizen (0.5L)  Käsespätzle  Kartoffelsalat  Schweinshaxe  and Spätzle Butter! Käsespätzle was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!

Solid experience. Hefeweizen (0.5L)  Kartoffelknödel mit Pilzrahmsoße  Leberknödelsuppe  and Obatzda mit Brezn were well-prepared. Kartoffelknödel mit Pilzrahmsoße had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Very satisfied! Gemüseschnitzel  Semmelknödel  and Spätzle Butter were fresh and flavorful. Semmelknödel was the standout dish.
Exceptional quality! Ordered Apfelstrudel mit Vanillesoße  Spätzle Butter  Reibekuchen mit Apfelmus  and Rinderroulade and everything was delicious. The Spätzle Butter melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Decent food but nothing special. Laugenbrezel mit Obatzda & Salat  Sauerkraut  Käsespätzle  Bratkartoffeln  and Rotkohl were okay. Bratkartoffeln lacked the punch I expected.
Absolutely amazing Wiener Schnitzel! The Wiener Schnitzel was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Good quality food. Schweinshaxe and Hefeweizen (0.5L) were nicely done. Hefeweizen (0.5L) could have been slightly spicier but still good!

Exceptional quality! Ordered Apfelstrudel mit Vanillesoße  Kartoffelknödel mit Pilzrahmsoße  and Bratkartoffeln and everything was delicious. The Kartoffelknödel mit Pilzrahmsoße melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Hands down the best Apfelstrudel mit Vanillesoße I've ever had! Apfelstrudel mit Vanillesoße were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Average experience. Currywurst Snack were fine but Currywurst Snack was a bit bland. Room for improvement.
